sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (event_id Int32, event_time DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY event_id;
INSERT INTO test_dates (event_id, event_time) VALUES (1, now() + INTERVAL 1 DAY);
SELECT event_id, event_time + INTERVAL 2 HOUR AS updated_time FROM test_dates;
UPDATE test_dates SET event_time = event_time + INTERVAL 5 DAY WHERE event_id = 1;
SELECT event_id, event_time, event_time - INTERVAL 1 MONTH AS past_time FROM test_dates;
